title: Playbook actions: read (UIA text) + shell (external command)
desc: YAML playbook actions 'read' and 'shell'. 'read' extracts text from a UIA/OCR target via UiaLocator.GetText and optionally stashes to a scenario variable. 'shell' runs an external command with timeout, captures stdout/stderr, honors expected exit_code, and can store stdout as a variable. Both resolve ${vars} in params.
steps: action: read -- target: {automation_id/name/ control_type} params.store_as captures UiaLocator.GetText result into ${store_as} for later steps.
action: shell -- params.command required. params.args string, params.working_dir, params.timeout_sec (default 30), params.exit_code (default 0), params.store_as stores stdout.
Behavior: shell uses UseShellExecute=false + CreateNoWindow=true + UTF-8 stdout/stderr. read delegates to the same UiaLocator.GetText helper used by DoAssert.

Dispatch sites: csharp/src/WKAppBot.Core/Runner/ActionExecutor.cs (DoRead, DoShell); parser: csharp/src/WKAppBot.Core/Scenario/ScenarioParser.cs; params: csharp/src/WKAppBot.Core/Scenario/Models.cs (StoreAs, Command, Args, WorkingDir, TimeoutSec, ExitCode).
Reference scenario: scenarios/read_shell_test.yaml -- Calculator + cmd.exe -- 5/5 PASS.
author: claude
